prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to Ambulance Services in England and focuses on clinical outcomes related to cardiac emergencies, which are managed under the healthcare system in England only. It does not apply to Scotland or any other UK nations, as healthcare services and statistics are organized differently across the UK.
